subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! Upon thee be My glory! Thou hast attained the presence of the Wronged One and taken flight at the call of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یوسف علیک بهائی قد حضرت بین یدی المظلوم و فرت بندآء الله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @petitions to authorities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
